data_description.api_url: The base URL of your MyCookbook instance, e.g. http://192.168.1.50:5000
data_description.api_key: Your MyCookbook API key (generate one at Settings → API Token)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to MyCookbook. Check the URL and that the server is running.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Generate a new one in MyCookbook under Settings → API Token.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.
